calendar.matters:
PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar Oct-23-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Joseph Lee for Oscar Roesler.

The Court granted the Petition to Terminate Estate (subject to review of the order).

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar Oct-07-2013 Continued To Oct-21-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The matter was continued to October 21, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Clerk will notified counsel by phone.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-17-2013 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-03-2013 Continued To Jul-17-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Joesph Lee specially appeared on behalf of Attorney Oscar Roesler for Ramon Cortes (Petitioner).

Mr. Lee stated that Mr. Roesler has been unable to make contact with his Client. Status on closing of the estate was continued to July 17, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If the accounting petition is not filed by that date, sanctions in the amount of $25.00 per day will begin to run.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar May-22-2013 Continued To Jul-03-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Oscar Roesler for Ramon Cortes.

Mr. Roesler stated that he could have the Petition for Final Distribution filed within 30-days. Status on closing of estate was continued to July 3, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-24-2013 Continued To May-22-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator and the Attorney to appear on May 22,2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the petition for final distribution has not been filed.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Nancy Bautista/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Whitehead.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-10-2013 Continued To Apr-24-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The status of closing the estate was continued to April 24, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Probate Examiner Helen Trowbridge to contact counsel with regard to report on status of administration that filed on March 2, 2013.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-08-2011 Continued To Jan-11-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Rachel Gendell for Ramon Cortes.

Ms. Gendell presented an endorsed copy of the Substutition of Attorney and stated that Counsel intended to keep the Estate open. An Order to Appear will be issued to new Counsel Oscar Roesler to appear on January 11, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of close of the Estate. The matter was continued to January 11, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing Of Estate

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing Of Estate

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-13-2011 Continued To Sep-13-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter is on calendar for filing of a petition for final distribution and has been pending in order to pursue a medical negligience action. A Notice to Appear will be issued to the Attorney Cory Birnberg to appear on September 13, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The matter was continued to September 13, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
